modules.block_1784210154716:
param atk = 0.01
param dur = 1
param rel = 0.5
param legato = 0

static block_1784210154716_env = 0

OUT[0] <- block_1784210154716_env

static block_1784210154716_gate = 1
block_1784210154716_gate ? (
  block_1784210154716_env < 1 ? block_1784210154716_env = atk <= 0 ? 1 : block_1784210154716_env + 1/(atk*SAMPLE_RATE)
) : block_1784210154716_env = block_1784210154716_env - 1/(rel*SAMPLE_RATE)
block_1784210154716_env = min 1 (max 0 block_1784210154716_env)
block_1784210154716_env <= 0 ? die

static block_1784210154716_dt = 1/SAMPLE_RATE
static block_1784210154716_t = 0
legato == 0 ? block_1784210154716_t = block_1784210154716_t + block_1784210154716_dt
block_1784210154716_t >= dur ? block_1784210154716_gate = 0
modules.block_1784210970621:
param amp = 0.2
param freq = 440
static block_1784210970621_ts = array 3 {_. 0}
static block_1784210970621_t = 0

OUT[0] <- amp * IN[0] * block_1784210970621_t

block_1784210970621_freqs = array 3 {i. freq*(1 + 0.01*(i - 1))}
static block_1784210970621_sr_inv2 = 2/SAMPLE_RATE
block_1784210970621_ts = zip {a b. a + b*block_1784210970621_sr_inv2} block_1784210970621_ts block_1784210970621_freqs
block_1784210970621_ts = map {a. a >= 1 ? a - 2 : a} block_1784210970621_ts
block_1784210970621_t = (foldr 0 {a acc. a + acc} block_1784210970621_ts)/3

modules.block_1784210988950:
param echo_delay = 2/3
param decay = 0.9

block_1784210988950_buffer = delay 48000 {_. 0}
static block_1784210988950_idx = 0

block_1784210988950_out = decay*@[block_1784210988950_idx]block_1784210988950_buffer
OUT[0] <- IN[1]*block_1784210988950_out
@[block_1784210988950_idx]block_1784210988950_buffer = IN[0] + block_1784210988950_out
block_1784210988950_idx = block_1784210988950_idx + 1
block_1784210988950_idx >= echo_delay*SAMPLE_RATE ? block_1784210988950_idx = 0
